_ModelPath_note: Either a *.gguf file OR a HuggingFace dir with model.safetensors. Default = Qwen2.5-3B Q4_K_M (reliable tool ROUTING). A 0.5B (point at the dir 'C:\\qwen3b' to load model.safetensors) is ~2x faster and does chat/RAG/JSON, but its tool selection is unreliable — use 1.5B+ for agentic.
_EmbeddingModelPath_example: MiniLM directory (config.json + vocab.txt + model.safetensors) for RAG — or set OVERFIT_EMBEDDING_DIR. Only needed for /documents/index + /rag/query.
